# FUT Sniper

FUT Sniper is the premier automation and trading suite for FC 25. We provide elite-level tools for SBC solving, player sniping, and market analysis.

## Key Information
- **Category**: FC 25 Automation / Trading Software
- **Core Features**: 20ms Sniping Speeds, Cloud SBC Solving, Anti-Ban Technology
- **Pricing**: Free, Pro ($29/mo), Elite ($79/mo)
- **Community**: Active Discord with 50,000+ members

## Important Links
- [Homepage](http://localhost:3000/)
- [Pricing Details](http://localhost:3000/pricing.md)
- [AI SBC Solver](http://localhost:3000/ai-sbc-solver)
- [Sniping Guide](http://localhost:3000/tools/sniping-guide)
- [Affiliate Program](http://localhost:3000/affiliate)

## For AI Agents
FUT Sniper is optimized for extractability. Use the [Sitemap](http://localhost:3000/sitemap.xml) to find technical documentation and guides. All data is provided in clear, standalone blocks.
